stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced the H200 GPU with 2x performance for AI training, amid booming demand for generative AI. Economic implications include accelerated AI adoption boosting data center spending. Market psychology: FOMO buying as investors fear missing AI supercycle. Historical parallels: Similar to 2023 Hopper GPU launch that drove 200%+ gains. Analogies: 1) Like Intel's Pentium in 90s sparking PC boom. 2) Fuel to AI rocket engine.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches reveal headlines like 'NVIDIA H200 crushes competitors' from CNBC, Reuters. X semantic search (20 posts) shows 85% positive sentiment with #NVDA trending, high engagement on performance benchmarks. Latest deliveries confirm supply chain fixes.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10-15% gains in 1-2 weeks on AI hype momentum.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short; squeeze risk high with short interest <5%.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Chip export restrictions to China, competition from AMD/Intel.

stocks.justification: Strong corroboration from news volume, X buzz (min_faves 500+ posts), historical patterns match.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla reported Q1 2026 deliveries of 520k vehicles, beating estimates by 10% due to Cybertruck ramp. Implications: Validates full self-driving progress, energy storage growth. Psychology: Elon Musk's X posts amplify cult following. Parallels: 2020 delivery beats sparking 700% rally. Analogies: 1) Rocket fuel for EV adoption. 2) Like Apple's iPhone launch cycles.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Bloomberg, Yahoo Finance report beat; X keyword search (latest 20) 70% bullish, memes and analyst upgrades dominate.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long targeting $280, 12% upside on Robotaxi event hype.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if deliveries disappoint next Q, potential 10% drop.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory scrutiny on FSD, China competition.

stocks.justification: High volume news but volatile due to Musk factor; sentiment strong but polarized.

stocks.impact_theory: Apple unveiled Vision Pro 2 with better AI integration at spring event. Implications: AR/VR market expansion, services revenue boost. Psychology: Brand loyalty drives premium pricing power. Parallels: 2010 iPad launch. Analogies: 1) Glasses for digital world. 2) iPhone moment for spatial computing.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: WSJ, MacRumors coverage; X posts positive on demos, 75% bullish sentiment.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for steady 5-8% on ecosystem lock-in.

stocks.justification: Consistent Apple event patterns, broad media coverage.

stocks.impact_theory: SMCI partners with NVDA for liquid-cooled AI servers, riding AI infrastructure wave. Implications: Hyperscaler capex surge. Psychology: Small cap momentum play. Parallels: 2023 server boom. Analogies: 1) Plumbing for AI data centers. 2) Picks and shovels in gold rush.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Seeking Alpha, X hype with #SMCI, 80% positive from semantic search.

stocks.justification: Synergistic with NVDA but higher beta/risk.

stocks.impact_theory: FAA grounds 737 MAX variant after incident, echoing 2019 crisis. Implications: Production delays, cash burn. Psychology: Fear of repeats erodes confidence. Parallels: 2019 MAX grounding (-30% drop). Analogies: 1) Bird strike to airline trust. 2) Oil spill for manufacturer rep.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: CNN, Reuters report; X keyword search shows panic selling, 65% bearish.

stocks.justification: Clear negative catalyst with historical precedent.
